stemHtml: A pilot is executing an ILS approach while the localiser needle is at half scale deflection. Is the pilot allowed to continue the approach?

options.a: No, a missed approach must be performed as obstacle clearance is no longer guaranteed.
options.b: No, a missed approach must be performed once the localiser display goes outside a quarter scale deflection.
options.c: Yes, as long as the glideslope is within half scale deflection.
options.d: Yes, the approach can be continued under any circumstances.
